mano_cua.result_summary: Dark主题下所有设置子页面底部出现异常深色色块。选择Dark主题并Update preferences后，页面body背景变为深色，但内容卡片/面板保持白色背景不变，导致内容区域下方出现明显的深色空白区域。Profile/Account/Appearance/Notifications/Display五个子页面均受影响，Display页面最明显（内容少空白区大）
mano_cua.last_reasoning: After selecting Dark theme and clicking Update preferences, page body/background switches to dark color but content cards/panels remain white. This creates jarring visual contrast: white content area above, dark empty space below on all settings sub-pages. Confirmed on Appearance, Profile, Account, Notifications, Display pages. Display page shows largest dark area due to minimal content.
